text.arabic: ((الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي مِمَّا ابْتَلاَكَ بِهِ، وَفَضَّلَنِي عَلَى كَثِيرٍ مِمَّنْ خَلَقَ تَفْضِيلاً)).
text.arabicTranslated: (Alhamdu lillahil-lathee AAafanee mimmab-talaka bih, wafaddalanee AAala katheerin mimman khalaqa tafdeela.)
text.translated: (All praise is for Allah Who saved me from that which He tested you with and Who most certainly favoured me over much of His creation.)

title: What to say if you see someone afflicted by misfortune
